description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Coppermine Photo Gallery (CPG) allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the (1) cmd parameter to (a) image_processor.php or (b) picmgmt.inc.php, or the (2) path parameter to (c) include/functions.php, (d) include/plugin_api.inc.php, (e) index.php, or (f) pluginmgr.php.
